team_name: TenderAI Lite – Smart Eligibility Analyzer for Government Tenders
summary: Design an AI-based platform for simplifying the process of analyzing government tender documents, extracting key eligibility criteria, organizing information, evaluating user eligibility, and reducing manual effort in the procurement process.
key_steps: Automatically extracts key eligibility criteria from tender documents
Identifies important details such as financial requirements, technical qualifications, certifications, and compliance conditions
Organizes extracted information into a structured format and clearly categorizes it into mandatory and optional requirements
Evaluates user eligibility based on the extracted criteria
optimization_claims: Reduces time and effort required to analyze tender documents
Minimizes the risk of missing important details
Enables businesses to quickly assess their eligibility before applying
Improves efficiency in the procurement process
